repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.backend.multi-tenant: isolation models silo pool bridge, row-level security, scoped queries carrying tenant id, cross-tenant leak prevention, noisy neighbor, per-tenant config, tenant-aware caching
write a verilog testbench for the FSM

retrieval_query: multi-tenant tenant isolation scoped query row-level security cross-tenant leak noisy neighbor tenant routing per-tenant cache

validation_smoke.name: code.backend.multi-tenant L3 validation smoke
signals: every data-access path includes the tenant id in its filter, verified by a negative cross-tenant test
a request authenticated as tenant A cannot read or mutate tenant B data through any endpoint
row-level security policies reject a query whose tenant context does not match the row
a cache key includes the tenant so one tenant never receives another tenant's cached response

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.backend.multi-tenant diagnosis smoke
signals: a query fetches by id without a tenant predicate, allowing access to another tenant's row
a cache entry is keyed without the tenant, returning tenant A's data to tenant B
a background job processes records across tenants without scoping to one
one tenant's heavy load degrades latency for all others sharing the pool
tenant context is read from a request field a client can forge rather than the authenticated principal
